title: Polygon mode button active in toolbar for 2D viewport
capture_instructions: In the toolbar (or 2D panel header), the Polygon mode button should be highlighted/active. No vertices placed yet. The cursor should appear as a crosshair when hovering over the 2D viewport. Profile Viewer is open, Reclassify Points is active.
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, Polygon mode selected, 2D viewport ready for vertex placement, no polygon started

annotations.label: 2D viewport — crosshair cursor visible, ready for vertex clicks
